title: Norsk Oljemuseum
summary:
KUTT! (English: Cut) is a national touring exhibition that began at the Norwegian Oil Museum in Stavanger, Norway.

The oil and gas industry is constantly working on developing new solutions and technologies to help mitigate global warming. But what new solutions are actually available on the Norwegian continental shelf, and how do they work? This was something the Norwegian Oil Museum wanted to focus on in its new exhibition.

I was tasked with creating visualisations for the Carbon Capture and Hydrogen parts of the exhibition. I also contributed other motion design throughout the exhibition.
